title: BEEWAY Cable Ties Black - 120 Pack 3.6mm Zip Ties, Tie Wraps for Home, Office, Garden, Assorted in Sizes 100mm, 150mm, 200mm, 300mm (30pcs/Size)
features: MULTIPLE LENGTH CABLE TIES - Beeway cable ties are constructed from industrial-grade, UL-certified polyamide PA66 nylon, offering exceptional toughness and a tensile strength of up to 40 lbs (18 kg). This set includes cable ties in various sizes: 100 mm x 3.6 mm, 150 mm x 3.6 mm, 200 mm x 3.6 mm, and 300 mm x 3.6 mm, with 30 pieces of each size.

DURABLE & HEAT & UV RESISTANT - Extremely UV and Heat resistant (UL Flammability of 94V.2) ensuring they can be exposed to high temperatures (-20F/176F) for extended periods of time and are suitable for indoor and outdoor use.
SELF-LOCKING DESIGN - Lock in place very securely, locking teeth stop the cable tie at the desired length. Easy to use and right to the point.

WIDE APPLICATION - The Beeway multi-functional cable ties are widely used in home, garden, office, and garage tidying. Not only perfect for cable or wire organized and binding using but also great for gardening, permanent fix, hanging heavy stuff, and so on.
WHAT YOU GET - Pack of 120 pcs Beeway cable ties (30pcs/size), 100% satisfied replacement if quality issue and delivery damaged.
description: Product Description DURABLE & HEAT & UV RESISTANT - Made of polyamide PA66 nylon - Extremely UV and heat-resistant, ensuring they can be exposed to high temperatures for extended periods SELF-LOCKING DESIGN - Lock in place securely, with locking teeth that stop the cable tie at the desired length - Easy to use and straightforward WIDE APPLIACATION - Perfect for organizing and securing cables or wires - Ideal for gardening, permanent fixes, hanging heavy objects, and more - Suitable for indoor and outdoor use SPECIFICATIONS Material: Nylon PA66 Fire-Proof Rating: 94V-2 Withstanding temperatures: -20℉ to 176℉ Size: 100mm(L)/150mm(L)/200mm(L)/300mm(L) x 3.6mm(W) x 1.0mm (H) Tensile Strength: 40Lbs / 18Kg Color: Black Package includes: 120pcs Beeway 3.6mm cable ties （30/size） SAFATY INFORMATION Handle with care and keep out of reach of young children. Be mindful of the tensile strength per cable tie when hanging heavy objects.
